description_long: This sculpture is a bust depicting a human figure with medium-length, straight hair and a somber facial expression. The face is detailed, with pronounced cheekbones, a straight nose, and slightly parted lips, giving the figure a contemplative look. The bust is mounted on a rectangular base, which appears to be roughly textured and slightly uneven at the edges. The back of the head and shoulders are less detailed, with the hair rendered in broad, flowing strokes. The entire sculpture is a uniform white color, suggesting it is made from plaster or marble. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements on the base.
description: A white bust of a human figure with straight hair and a contemplative expression, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head and shoulders, with hair rendered in broad strokes and minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight nose, and the layered hair falling over the ear.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the full face, detailed features, and the symmetrical hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view focusing on the back and side of the head, with the hair's texture and the shoulder's form visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
